verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite kihei kikin Migdol leh tuipi kikal, Pihahiroth mai, Baalzefon nisuahna lamah giahphual a sat ding gen in. Tuipi gei, tua galkhatah giahphual na sat ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro in Israel mite' thu tawh kisai genin, ‘Sehnel gam sungah amaute tangciak uh hi. Sehnel gam in amaute khuhcip khin hi,’ ci ding hi

Keimah in Faro' lungsim khauhsakin, amah in Israel-te hong delh ding a, Faro leh a mihonpite khempeuh ka zawhna hangin minthan'na ka ngah ding hi. Kei, Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mite in thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute zong tua bangmahin gamta uh hi

Mite tai khinzo hi, ci-in Egypt kumpipa kiangah a kigen ciangin, Faro leh ama nasemte' ngaihsutna kikhel a, amaute in, “Eite' na hong sepna ding panin Israel mite i paikhiatsak, hih banga i gamtat bang hi mawk ahi hiam?” ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in a leeng kithawi sakin ama galkapte la-in
a kitengkhia leeng za guk leh Egypt leeng khempeuh a ukte tawh kuan khawm hi
Topa in Egypt kumpipa Faro' lungsim khauhsak a, Israel mite kithamuan'na tawh a paikhiat lai takun a delh hi

Egypt mite ahi, Faro' sakolte, leengte, ama sakol tung tuangte leh a galkapte in amaute delh uh a, amaute giahphual satin tuipi gei-a a omna uh, Pihahiroth gei, Baalzefon nisuahna lam munah a pha uh hi
Faro hong nai ciangin Israel mite khuadak to uh hi. En in, amaute' nungah Egypt mite hong kuan hi. Amaute lau mahmah uh hi. Topa' tungah Israel mite kiko uh hi
Amaute in Moses kiangah, “Egypt-ah han a omloh manin sehnel gam sungah a si dingin kote hong paikhiatpih na hi hiam? Egypt panin paikhiatpihna tawh kote' tungah bang hong bawl na hi hiam

‘Kote hong hici omsak in la, Egypt mite' na hong semsak in,’ ci-in Egypt-ah nang' tungah hong gen hilo ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh sehnel gamah sih sangin Egypt mite' na sep ding kote-a' dingin hoihzaw ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Moses in mite tungah, “Lau kei un, kiptakin om un. Note-a' dingin tuni-a hong sep ding Topa' hotkhiatna mu un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-a na muh uh Egypt mite, note in na mukik nawn kei ding uh hi
Topa in note-a' dingin hong dosak ding a, note ahih leh na om hithiat ding uh hi bek hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Bang hangin kei' tungah hong kiko na hi uh hiam? Israel mite mai nawtin a pai ding uh gen in
Israel mite in lei keu tung tawnin tuipi a kantan theihna dingin na ciangkhut laamto in la, tuipi tungah na khut zanin tuipi khenkham in

Amau' nungah Egypt mite hong pai-in, keimah in Faro leh a mihonpite khempeuh, a leengte, leh a sakol tung tuangte ka zawhna hangin minthan'na ka ngahna dingin keimah in Egypt mite' lungsim ka khauhsak ding hi
Faro leh ama leengte leh ama sakol tung tuangte ka zawhna hangin minthan'na ka ngah khit ciangin Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mite in hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel mihonpite' mai-ah a pai Pasian' vantung mi kikhinin amaute' nungah a pai hi. Amaute' mai panin meii khuam kikhinin amaute' nungah ding a
Egypt honpite leh Israel honpite' kikalah a pai hi. Tua lai-ah meii leh khuamial om a, zan tawntung khatlekhat kinai kha loin zingsang khua hong vak hi
Tua ciangin Moses in tuipi tungah a khut zan hi. Topa in zan tawntung nisuahna huihpi hat tawh tuipi mutgawpin, tuipi pen lei keu-in bawl a, tuite a kikhen hi
Israel mite, tuipi laizang lei keu tungah pai uh a, amau' taklam leh veilamah kawm bangin tuite om hi
Egypt mite ahi, Faro' sakol khempeuh, ama leengte, leh ama sakol tung tuangte in delhin tuipi laizang amaute' nungah pai uh hi
Zingsang ciangin Topa in mei leh meii khuam sung panin Egypt mihonpite en sukin, Egypt mihonpite phialgawp a

amau' leengpeite gumsak ahih manin man bekbakin hawl uh hi. Egypt mite in, “Israel mite' kiang panin tai ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite hong langpangin Topa in amau-a' dingin hong do hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt mite' tung, amau' leengte tung, leh amau' sakol tung tuangte' tungah tui hong luan'kik theihna dingin tuipi tungah na khut zan in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Moses in tuipi tungah a khut zan a, a zingsang khuavak ciangin a luan' ngei bangin tuipi hong luangkik hi. Tua tui sung panin Egypt mite taikhiat sawm uh a, ahi zongin Topa in tuipi laizangah Egypt mite zogawp hi
Tui hong paikikin leengte leh sakol tung tuangte leh tuipi sungah amaute a delh Faro' mihonpite khempeuh tuum a, amaute khat zong suaktalo hi
Ahih hangin tuipi kantanin lei keu tungah Israel mite pai uh a, amau' taklam leh veilamah kawm bangin tuite a om hi
Topa in tua bangin Egypt mite' khutsung panin tua ni-in Israel-te honkhia a, tuipi gei-ah Egypt mi a site, Israel mite in mu uh hi
Israel mite in Egypt mite' tungah Topa' bawl nasepna lianpi mu uh a, mite in Topa a zahtak uh hi. Amaute in Topa leh ama nasem Moses a um uh hi.
